commands.review_summary:
The PR adds persistent session echo targets with CLI and Gateway controls plus outbound mirroring across pinned channels.

PR surface: Source +789, Tests +329. Total +1118 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows self-exclusion compares raw strings while Telegram supports raw and prefixed forms for the same chat. Not applicable as a current-main bug because this is a new feature PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can normalize echo target identity comparisons and fix the CLI JSON at-limit status, while maintainer approval remains a separate merge decision.
